nodes.name: Grey-crowned crocias
nodes.summary: Grey-crowned crocias（Grey-crowned crocias，学名 Laniellus langbianis），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: | editor2-link=Leslie Christidis | year=2014 | title=The Howard & Moore Complete Checklist of the Birds of the World | volume=2: Passerines | edition=4th | place=Eastbourne, UK | publisher=Aves Press | isbn=978-0-9568611-2-2 | page=548 }} It is threatened by habitat loss, although the species is elusive and easily overlooked, so much so that it was previously considered critically endangered
